About Us

About B2Bbaby

Your trusted partner for certified baby products from China. 15+ years of experience serving brands worldwide.

Our Story

Founded in 2010 with a mission to provide high-quality, safe baby products to the global market, we have grown into a trusted manufacturer and sourcing partner for brands worldwide.

With 15+ years of experience in the baby products industry, we understand the importance of safety, quality, and reliability. Every product we produce goes through rigorous quality control and meets international safety standards.

200+
Staff
10,000
sqm Factory
30+
Countries Served

Our Core Values

Safety First

Products meet and exceed international safety standards including ASTM, EN, and CPC requirements

Quality Commitment

Rigorous QC at every stage of production - from raw materials to final packaging

Partner Success

Your success is our priority - we work closely with you to ensure market success

Export Markets Served

We proudly serve brands across the globe with proven track record:

North America

  • United States
  • Canada
  • Mexico

Western Europe

  • Germany
  • United Kingdom
  • France, Netherlands

Oceania

  • Australia
  • New Zealand

Asia-Pacific

  • Japan
  • South Korea
  • Singapore
